response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a Hololive English 'Justice' 2nd Anniversary celebration.
2. Performed OCR and manual inspection to find the song title 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL'.
3. Separated the video into two scenes: the introductory talk (00:00-02:16) and the song performance (02:16-03:59).
4. Searched for 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL Hololive English lyrics'. The search tool did not return accurate official lyrics for this specific original song, so the lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: A video of the Hololive English 'Justice' members (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Raora Panthera, Cecilia Immergreen, Gigi Murin) performing their original song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' during their 2nd Anniversary celebration. The video includes an introductory segment followed by the full vocal performance.

scenes.description: Introductory segment where the members talk to the audience and celebrate their 2nd anniversary.

scenes.description: Performance of the original song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' by the Hololive English Justice members.
